# Open Workbook

> Local-first MCP runtime for fast, reversible, template-aware Excel automation through Office.js, a local backend, and MCP clients such as OpenCode.

Open Workbook lets agents work with live desktop Excel workbooks while preserving templates, styling, formulas, filters, tables, charts, pivots, backups, rollback records, permissions, and multi-agent transaction safety. It is designed for local-first workflows where teams can use OpenRouter or any MCP-capable agent without locking Excel automation to one frontier AI provider.

Key patterns:
- **Local-first Excel runtime**: MCP server, backend broker, Office.js add-in, and CLI run locally.
- **Safety lifecycle**: Mutations go through permissions, scoped locks, snapshots, backups, fingerprint checks, Office.js execution, validation, audit events, and rollback metadata.
- **Template fidelity**: Registered templates, style fingerprints, formula pattern checks, table/filter/sort preservation, validation, and repair workflows.
- **Fast reads/writes**: Range and batch operations use Office.js payloads instead of per-cell automation.
- **Multi-agent coordination**: Task registry, leases, transaction queue, conflict guidance, rollback preview, and rollback chains.
- **Capability honesty**: Host-limited Office.js paths return explicit warnings or `CAPABILITY_UNAVAILABLE` instead of pretending to work.

Install from source:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook.git
cd open-workbook
corepack pnpm install
corepack pnpm build
node packages/cli/dist/index.js doctor
```

Common installed commands:

```bash
owb doctor
owb daemon start
owb file-bridge start
owb mcp
owb addin serve
owb sideload mac
owb sideload windows --out open-workbook.xml
owb opencode config --id open-workbook --agent-name finance-agent
```

Agent skill source:

- `skills/open-workbook-excel/SKILL.md`
- `skills/open-workbook-excel/references/`

## Docs

- [Full LLM Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/main/llms-full.txt): Complete generated project reference in one file
- [Agent Skill: Open Workbook Excel](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/skills/open-workbook-excel): Skill source for fast, reliable live Excel automation through Open Workbook MCP
- [README](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, architecture, setup, and safety contract
- [Installation](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/installation.md): Local install and startup flow
- [Tool Surface](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/tool-surface.md): Stable, preview, and capability-limited MCP tools
- [Architecture](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): Runtime components and catalog policy
- [Backup Lifecycle](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/backup-lifecycle.md): Snapshot, file backup, restore, retention, and rollback model
- [Template System](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/template-system.md): Template detection, registration, creation, validation, and repair
- [Style Fidelity](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/style-fidelity.md): Style fingerprints and native Office.js format copy behavior
- [Formula Intelligence](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/formula-intelligence.md): Formula patterns, dependencies, validation, repair, and explanations
- [Tables, Filters, and Sorts](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/table-filter-sort.md): Table, filter, and sort operations
- [PivotTables and Charts](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/pivot-chart.md): Pivot/chart creation, validation, fingerprints, repair, and capability limits
- [Multi-Agent Runtime](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/multi-agent-runtime.md): Tasks, locks, serialized commits, conflicts, and rollback chains
- [Workbook File Lifecycle](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/workbook-file-lifecycle.md): Save-as, export copy, native file bridge, and full-file backup restore
- [Performance Contract](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/performance.md): Batch sizing and latency expectations
- [Production Readiness](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/production-readiness.md): Release gates and known host limitations
- [OpenCode Configuration](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/opencode.md): OpenCode MCP setup
- [Sideloading](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/sideloading.md): Excel add-in sideloading on macOS and Windows

## Packages

- [@open-workbook/protocol](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/protocol): Tool catalog, JSON-RPC contracts, resources, prompts, errors, and workbook types
- [@open-workbook/excel-core](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/excel-core): Planning, backups, snapshots, templates, fingerprints, permissions, locks, and transactions
- [@open-workbook/office-js-engine](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/office-js-engine): Office.js engine adapter contracts
- [@open-workbook/cli](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/cli): `owb` CLI for MCP, daemon, add-in serving, sideloading, diagnostics, and config generation
- [@open-workbook/backend](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/apps/backend): Local broker and runtime service
- [@open-workbook/mcp-server](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/apps/mcp-server): MCP stdio server
- [@open-workbook/excel-addin](https://github.com/open-workbook/open-workbook/tree/main/apps/excel-addin): Office.js add-in runtime
